emails.subject: Sempra confirm
emails.body: I have one Sempra confirm dated May 30 for Enron's Mid-C purchase of 50 MW's of HLH energy 7/1-31. Can you email the Sempra fax number and contact name of who it needs to be sent to? Thanks.

emails.subject: RE: Sempra confirm
emails.body: RE: Sempra confirm Hello Ed, The contact person at Sempra is Tim Cannon and fax number is (203)355-6600. For your info, their phone number is (203)355-5190. Lisa To: Gang, Lisa

emails.subject: RE: Sempra confirm
emails.body: Thanks. It has been sent. To: Baughman, Edward
